ucs.title: [LLM] Bluenoroff / Sapphire Sleet (TA444) recruiter-lure chain: ISO/LNK from messaging or browser spawning mshta/PowerShell with HTTP staging
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical TA444/Sapphire Sleet 'fake recruiter / fake VC' intrusion chain in which a target is socially engineered on LinkedIn, Telegram or Teams, downloads an ISO/VHD/ZIP archive containing a weaponized LNK or PDF lure, and the LNK launches mshta.exe, regsvr32 /i:http (Squiblydoo), or PowerShell -enc to fetch the second-stage RustBucket/KANDYKORN/SnatchCrypto loader. The container-then-LOLBin pivot is highly characteristic of APT38/Stardust Chollima/COPERNICIUM operators per CrowdStrike, Microsoft (Sapphire Sleet) and Kaspersky reporting on SnatchCrypto.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.process_path) as proc_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("explorer.exe","7zG.exe","WinRAR.exe","Bandizip.exe","Teams.exe","ms-teams.exe","OUTLOOK.EXE","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","curl.exe","certutil.exe","hh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*http*" OR Processes.process="*scrobj.dll*" OR Processes.process="*-enc*" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*-w hidden*" OR Processes.process="*/i:http*" OR Processes.process="*.sct*" OR Processes.process="*.hta*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="*.lnk" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.iso" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.img" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.vhd" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.zip" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.rar") AND (Filesystem.file_path="*\\Downloads\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Temp\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Teams\\*") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename file_name as dropped_container, file_path as dropped_path] | where firstTime - _time < 3600 | table firstTime, lastTime, dest, user, parent_process_name, process_name, process, dropped_container, dropped_path | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
ucs.kql:
let LookbackContainers = 1h;
let SuspiciousContainers = DeviceFileEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
  | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
  | where FileName matches regex @"(?i)\.(lnk|iso|img|vhd|vhdx|zip|rar|7z)$"
  | where FolderPath has_any (@"\Downloads\", @"\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\", @"\AppData\Local\Packages\")
  | project DeviceId, ContainerTime=Timestamp, ContainerName=FileName, ContainerPath=FolderPath, InitiatingDownloader=InitiatingProcessFileName;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("explorer.exe","7zG.exe","WinRAR.exe","Bandizip.exe","Teams.exe","ms-teams.exe","OUTLOOK.EXE","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe")
| where FileName in~ ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","curl.exe","certutil.exe","hh.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://","scrobj.dll","-enc","FromBase64String","-w hidden","-nop","/i:http",".sct",".hta","IEX(","DownloadString","Invoke-WebRequest")
| join kind=inner SuspiciousContainers on DeviceId
| where ContainerTime between (Timestamp - LookbackContainers .. Timestamp)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, ContainerName, ContainerPath, InitiatingDownloader, ReportId
| extend ActorHypothesis="Bluenoroff / Sapphire Sleet (TA444 / APT38) recruiter-lure delivery"
ucs.rationale: Generic LOLBin alerts fire constantly. This UC is tied to TA444 specifically because (1) it requires the LOLBin (mshta/regsvr32 /i:http/PowerShell -enc) to be a child of an extractor, mail or messaging client — the exact pivot Sapphire Sleet uses after a LinkedIn/Teams recruiter contact — and (2) it requires a recently-dropped ISO/VHD/LNK/ZIP container in Downloads, Teams cache or Temp, which is t

ucs.title: [LLM] Bluenoroff (APT38 / BeagleBoyz / TA444) crypto-wallet & keychain harvesting from non-browser processes
ucs.description: Hunts the post-exploitation objective Bluenoroff is uniquely defined by — theft of cryptocurrency wallet extension data, wallet.dat files and browser credential stores — by detecting non-browser processes that read or copy from MetaMask/Phantom/Coinbase/TronLink/Binance/TrustWallet extension storage directories or known desktop wallet paths. This is the terminal stage of SnatchCrypto/KANDYKORN/RustBucket/ObjCShellz operations and is what separates Bluenoroff from the rest of the Lazarus umbrella, whose financial mandate is documented by US-CERT (BeagleBoyz/HIDDEN COBRA) and CrowdStrike (Stardu
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as paths from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="*nkbihfbeogaeaoehlefnkodbefgpgknn*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*bfnaelmomeimhlpmgjnjophhpkkoljpa*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*hnfanknocfeofbddgcijnmhnfnkdnaad*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*fhbohimaelbohpjbbldcngcnapndodjp*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*ibnejdfjmmkpcnlpebklmnkoeoihofec*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*egjidjbpglichdcondbcbdnbeeppgdph*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Local Extension Settings\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Exodus\\exodus.wallet*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Electrum\\wallets\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Ethereum\\keystore\\*" OR Filesystem.file_name="wallet.dat" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Login Data*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Cookies*") AND NOT Filesystem.process_name IN ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","vivaldi.exe","explorer.exe","SearchProtocolHost.exe","OneDrive.exe","MsMpEng.exe","backup.exe") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.process_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime dc(paths) as unique_wallet_paths values(paths) as paths values(process_name) as process_name values(process_path) as process_path by dest user | where unique_wallet_paths >= 2 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let WalletExtensionIds = dynamic([
  "nkbihfbeogaeaoehlefnkodbefgpgknn",  // MetaMask Chrome
  "ejbalbakoplchlghecdalmeeeajnimhm",  // MetaMask Edge
  "bfnaelmomeimhlpmgjnjophhpkkoljpa",  // Phantom
  "hnfanknocfeofbddgcijnmhnfnkdnaad",  // Coinbase Wallet
  "fhbohimaelbohpjbbldcngcnapndodjp",  // BinanceChain
  "egjidjbpglichdcondbcbdnbeeppgdph",  // TrustWallet
  "ibnejdfjmmkpcnlpebklmnkoeoihofec",  // TronLink
  "aiifbnbfobpmeekipheeijimdpnlpgpp",  // Terra Station
  "fhbohimaelbohpjbbldcngcnapndodjp"   // Binance
]);
let WalletPathSignatures = dynamic([
  @"\Local Extension Settings\",
  @"\Exodus\exodus.wallet",
  @"\Electrum\wallets\",
  @"\Ethereum\keystore\",
  @"\Atomic\Local Storage\",
  "Library/Application Support/Google/Chrome/Default/Local Extension Settings",
  "Library/Keychains/login.keychain-db",
  @"\AppData\Roaming\Bitcoin\wallet.dat"
]);
let TrustedReaders = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","vivaldi.exe","explorer.exe","SearchProtocolHost.exe","OneDrive.exe","MsMpEng.exe","MsSense.exe","backup.exe"]);
let FileHits =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified","FileCopied")
    | where FolderPath has_any (WalletExtensionIds) or FolderPath has_any (WalletPathSignatures) or FileName in~ ("wallet.dat","login.keychain-db","Login Data","Cookies","Local State")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (TrustedReaders)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName=InitiatingProcessAccountName, ProcName=InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcPath=InitiatingProcessFolderPath, ProcCmd=InitiatingProcessCommandLine, FolderPath, FileName, SHA256=InitiatingProcessSHA256;
let ProcHits =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (WalletExtensionIds) or ProcessCommandLine has_any (WalletPathSignatures) or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wallet.dat","login.keychain-db","Local Extension Settings")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (TrustedReaders) and FileName !in~ (TrustedReaders)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcName=FileName, ProcPath=FolderPath, ProcCmd=ProcessCommandLine, FolderPath="", FileName="", SHA256;
union FileHits, ProcHits
| summarize HitCount=count(), UniqueWalletArtifacts=dcount(strcat(FolderPath,FileName)), FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp), Samples=make_set(strcat(FolderPath,"|",FileName,"|",ProcCmd), 10) by DeviceName, AccountName, ProcName, SHA256
| where UniqueWalletArtifacts >= 2 or HitCount >= 5
| extend ActorHypothesis="Bluenoroff / APT38 / Stardust Chollima crypto theft objective"
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Bluenoroff/APT38 is the only DPRK cluster whose primary objective is direct theft of cryptocurrency from individual employees of exchanges, DeFi protocols, VC firms and fintechs — every public report (US-CERT BeagleBoyz, Kaspersky SnatchCrypto, Elastic KANDYKORN, Jamf RustBucket/ObjCShellz) ends in this exact action: a non-browser process reaching into Chromium 'Local Extension Settings' for known
